summary: Testing completed for Sync Control feature. All backend APIs (19/19 tests) and frontend UI components working correctly. The /sync-control page loads with title 'Sync Control', 5 macro buttons (Clientes, Ventas, Productos, Stock, Créditos), and job monitor table showing all 9 jobs with correct columns.
passed_tests: GET /api/odoo-sync/job-status returns 200 with all 9 jobs
GET /api/odoo-sync/job-status contains all expected job codes (RES_COMPANY, STOCK_LOCATIONS, STOCK_QUANTS, RES_USERS, RES_PARTNER, PRODUCTS, ATTRIBUTES, POS_ORDERS, AR_CREDIT_INVOICES)
GET /api/odoo-sync/job-status returns last_runs dictionary
GET /api/odoo-sync/job-status returns running_jobs array
Job objects have required fields (job_code, enabled, schedule_type, mode, chunk_size, company_scope)
GET /api/odoo-sync/job-status?job_code=PRODUCTS returns specific job with last_run
GET with invalid job_code returns error
POST /api/odoo-sync/run accepts request and returns {success: true}
POST /api/odoo-sync/run requires job_code (422 on missing)
POST /api/odoo-sync/run accepts optional mode parameter
POST /api/odoo-sync/run-batch accepts array of job_codes
POST /api/odoo-sync/run-batch returns submitted job_codes
POST /api/odoo-sync/run-batch requires job_codes (422 on missing)
Macro job codes verified: Clientes=RES_PARTNER, Ventas=POS_ORDERS, Productos=PRODUCTS+ATTRIBUTES, Stock=STOCK_QUANTS, Créditos=AR_CREDIT_INVOICES
/sync-control page: Title 'Sync Control' displayed
/sync-control page: Nav link 'Sync Control' present in navigation bar
/sync-control page: 5 macro buttons visible (clientes, ventas, productos, stock, creditos)
/sync-control page: Job monitor table with all 9 job rows
/sync-control page: Table has correct columns (job_code, Estado, mode, schedule, chunk, scope, Última OK, Último run, Filas, Error, Acción)
/sync-control page: Each job row has 'Run' button
/sync-control page: OK/ERROR/RUNNING badges functional
/sync-control page: Refresh button present
Navigation from home page to /sync-control works
critical_code_review_comments: Backend endpoints correctly implement job status polling with running_jobs tracking
Frontend correctly shows macro buttons with job mappings displayed
Job monitor table includes all required columns per requirements
Badges (OK/ERROR/RUNNING) work correctly based on job status
Background sync execution works - endpoints return immediately while job runs in background

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Sync Control page renders correctly with all required elements)

seed_data_creation: None - using existing sync_job and sync_run_log data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sync Control feature fully tested. 9 jobs exist: RES_COMPANY, STOCK_LOCATIONS, STOCK_QUANTS, RES_USERS, RES_PARTNER, PRODUCTS, ATTRIBUTES, POS_ORDERS, AR_CREDIT_INVOICES. Note: POST /api/odoo-sync/run and run-batch actually trigger real Odoo sync jobs in background - be careful not to trigger unnecessary syncs during testing.

test_observations.backend_api: All 3 new endpoints working: GET job-status (single/all), POST run (single job), POST run-batch (multiple jobs)
test_observations.frontend_page: /sync-control page loads with title, 5 macro buttons, job monitor table with 9 jobs
test_observations.table_columns: job_code, Estado, mode, schedule, chunk, scope, Última OK, Último run, Filas, Error, Acción - all present
test_observations.macro_buttons: Actualizar Clientes, Ventas, Productos, Stock, Créditos - all have Ejecutar buttons and show job mappings
test_observations.navigation: Sync Control nav link present and navigation works correctly
